titleStmt.title: SII 22.441: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 441. (A.R. No. 441 of 1906) COIMBATORE DISTRICT, GOPICHETTIPALAIYAM TALUK, DAṆĀYAKAṈKŌṬṬAI. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE IN THE FORT—ON THE SAME WALL

summary.p: The inscription gives the details of date as Pingaḷa, Tai 25, Sunday, Chaturdaśi, Tiruvoṇam, ardhōdaya corresponding to A.D. 1498, January 21, f.d.n. ·22.

This records a gift of 45 poṉ for the expenses of offerings during the daily [ardha]yāma service in the temple of Tāntōṉṟīśvaram-Uḍaiyār at Tuṟavalūr, with the interest thereon, by Dēvarasaiyaṉ Maṅgarasaiyaṉ a karaṇika-niyōgi of of Śevvūr in Āṟu-nāḍu, who deposited the amount with the three Sthānika-Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastajagadhādipatiyappa śrīkailāsanivāsan pārvatiprāṇanāthan Ellātevar vallabhan Oṭuvaṅkānāṭṭut tuṟavalūrāṉa nilagiri sādhaāraṇan koṭṭaiyil Āḷuṭaiyār tāntoṉṟiyiśvaramuṭaiyāṟku śrī viranañcarāya Uṭaiyaṟku cellāniṉṟa śālivāhana śa
kanṛpan Āṇṭu 1000 4 100 10 9- kkumel cellāniṉṟa piṅkaḷa varuṣam tai mātam 2 10 5 tiyati nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum caturddaśiyum
tiruvoṇamum vyatipādamum peṟṟa Aryodaya puṇṇiya kālattile koṭṭaicūḻnta Āṟunāṭṭu cevvūril karaṇikka niyogikaḷil viśāmitragotrattu devaracaiyyaṉ maṅkaracaiyaṉ dharmmasādhanam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāyiṉāṟku nām kaṟpitta kaṭṭiḷai nāḷ Oṉṟukku jāmattu Avacarattukku ṉaivedyattukku Arici paṭi 2 paruppu collakai
ney collakai va vaḻutilaṅkāy 1 pākku 5 veṟṟilai 7 nandādipam 1 Avacaradipam 8 Immaruvāti naṭattum
paṭikku stānikar civabrāhmaṇaril kāśyapagotrattu maṉṉiyāvuṭaiyār makkaḷ Āvattukkāttār poṉṉāṇai nampi mallaiyaṉ Immuvarum paṟṟikkoṇṭa poṉ 4 10 5 Ippoṉ nāṟpattañcukkum vaṭṭiyāluḷḷa viśeṣattile Immaruvāti naivedyattuk kaṭṭaḷai candrādityavarai kuṭaṅkoṇṭu kovil pukuntavaṉ naṭatti varakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Inta dharmmattai Ahitam paṇṇukil gaṅkaikkaraiyil pacuvaiyum brāhmaṇaraiyum (ā few letters lost At the End)
Digital edition of SII 22.441 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
